title: Chestnut and Syrian Tagine Stew
description: A hearty German-inspired stew featuring tender chestnuts and the warmth of Syrian spices
instructions: Heat tagine in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 8 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chestnuts, sauerkraut, Syrian spice blend, caraway seeds, and vegetable broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in apple cider vinegar and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
